name: ping
description: Replies with pong. Used to test if the bot is responsive.

name: gear
description: Get details about a single gear item. Searches based on provided text and returns the top result.

options.name: price
options.description: Show stored prices for a gear item

name: leaderboard
description: Show top contributors to gear specs.

name: compare
description: Fetch a comparison between two provided gear items.
examples: /compare one:Sony A7 IV two:Canon EOS R5

name: totals
description: Show the total number of gear items in the database and contributions to gear specs all-time.

name: trending
description: Show the top 10 trending gear items from the last 7 or 30 days. Defaults to 7 days.

name: Search Gear
description: Search for gear mentioned in a message. Right-click a message and run Search Gear.
examples: Right-click a message → Apps → Search Gear
